# ValueRowWidget constructor

Key/value row child widget for a [`PanelSpec`](../PanelSpec.md); value is re-pulled each refresh.

```csharp
public ValueRowWidget(string Key, Func<string> Value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| Key | Static label displayed on the left. |
| Value | Dynamic value factory displayed on the right; re-pulled each refresh. |
